summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was invented. Open PRs with unresolved maintainer, security-boundary, active-author, or review-bot judgment were scoped to item-level needs_human; ordinary open PRs were kept related or independent; the already-closed seed PR was kept closed. Security-sensitive linked issue #86525 was routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Maintainer or contributor follow-up is needed on the unresolved review finding before any close or merge path can be planned.
Keep the PR related to its live issue; do not close or merge in this plan-only inventory shard.
Keep the PR related to the live .m2a support issue; no closure action is safe or allowed here.
Keep the current open PR related to its live Discord mention parsing issue.
Maintainer judgment is required on production reachability before this PR can be classified as merge-ready or superseded.
Keep independent; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed from this plan-only inventory evidence.
Security-sensitive issue is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and must be routed centrally.
Maintainer/security-boundary judgment is required before Clownfish can recommend any mutation for this PR.
Keep independent as an open standalone PR; no dedupe or closure path is supported by the shard evidence.
Human review is needed to confirm which review-bot findings are obsolete or resolved before a merge or close classification can be planned.
Already closed; no mutation is valid.

needs_human: #73704 needs maintainer/contributor resolution of the latest ClawSweeper needs-changes state and Greptile P1 runtime-model finding.
#88841 needs maintainer judgment because a maintainer explicitly declined merge pending production-reachability proof and the author replied with active follow-up.
#86527 needs maintainer/security-boundary judgment because it changes trusted-proxy behavior tied to quarantined security issue #86525.
#55211 needs human confirmation that historical actionable review-bot findings are obsolete or resolved before any merge-ready classification.
